title: DataTweaks
body:
# DataTweaks

**Make datapack development easier – without breaking vanilla compatibility.**

**DataTweaks** is a lightweight utility mod designed for datapack creators. It adds helpful tweaks that streamline datapack development, without altering how datapacks function in vanilla Minecraft.

## ✨ Features

* 🔁 **Backport of `/datapack create`** – Available in Minecraft 1.21.6+, this powerful command is now accessible in older versions.
* 🧰 **Tweaks tailored for developers** – Tools and commands that make testing, building, and maintaining datapacks simpler and faster.
* ✅ **Fully vanilla-compatible** – Datapacks made or edited with DataTweaks still work perfectly in unmodded Minecraft.

## 🧠 Who is this for?
If you're a datapack developer looking to improve your workflow, debug faster, or just want quality-of-life features without affecting gameplay mechanics, **DataTweaks** is for you.

## 🔧 Technical Info
Safe to remove at any time – it doesn’t modify core mechanics or save data.

## ⚠ Early Development
**DataTweaks** is still in early development and still has a long way to go before reaching its full potential, more features will be added and some systems will have reworks in final updates.
Version will release at variaing times. Pre-Release versions will be available for minimal game versions, and release versions will be ported to common minecraft versions.
